title: Summary: Turn 16
content: README.md for Pueblo (CLI code agent, TypeScript/Node.js) details setup: Node.js 22 LTS, npm install, configure via `.pueblo/config.json`, build with `npm run build`, test with `npm test`, launch via `node dist/cli/index.js`. Key features include GitHub Copilot/DeepSeek support, session lifecycle, tools (grep, glob, exec), and SQLite persistence.
